title: App not loading or showing errors
description: Troubleshooting steps when WagerProof isn't loading properly or showing error messages.

content.text: If WagerProof isn't loading correctly, try these steps in order.

steps.title: Check your internet connection
steps.description: WagerProof requires an active internet connection to load game data and predictions. Try opening another app or website to confirm your connection is working.

steps.title: Force close and reopen
steps.description: Close the app completely (swipe it away from your recent apps) and reopen it.

steps.title: Clear cache (mobile)
steps.description: On Android, go to Settings > Apps > WagerProof > Storage > Clear Cache. On iOS, uninstalling and reinstalling the app clears the cache.

steps.title: Update the app
steps.description: Make sure you're running the latest version. Check the App Store or Play Store for updates.

steps.title: Try the web app
steps.description: If the mobile app isn't working, try accessing wagerproof.bet in your browser to see if the issue is device-specific.

content.text: If none of these steps work, contact support@wagerproof.bet with details about the error you're seeing.
